summary: Iteration 36 testing completed successfully. All requested features verified: Landing header Resources dropdown includes all footer links (About, Success Stories, Legal Terms, Contact, Terms & Privacy); Barrister showcase section reflects upgraded premium details (comparative sentencing snapshot, relief options matrix, barrister-ready strategy notes); Extensive Log pricing copy includes barrister conference dossier, comparative tables, and options matrix; AU spelling used consistently (Organise, Analysing, analyse) in UI strings; Backend extensive_log prompt includes mandatory Barrister Conference Dossier section (## 18).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 verified all content updates for the landing page including: 1) Resources dropdown has footer links 2) Barrister showcase section has updated premium details with comparative sentencing/relief options matrix mentions 3) Extensive Log pricing mentions barrister conference dossier 4) AU spelling (Organise/Analysing/analyse) used throughout UI 5) Backend extensive_log prompt has Barrister Conference Dossier as mandatory section 18. Note: API endpoints use 'analyze' (US spelling) as they are established API contracts - only user-facing text uses AU spelling.
